action.reasoning: Observation: 3 epochs in ~97s, val_acc=0.59. But val labels are also noisy (~40% noise), so true test accuracy could be higher. Analysis: Pipeline works. Need to push accuracy with more epochs + noise-robust techniques. Since val itself is noisy with 40% noise, max possible val_acc ~60% even with perfect predictions. So 0.59 is already near ceiling on val. True test accuracy should be much higher. Decision: Submit eval first to get baseline test score, then iterate.
